soft_rules: Prefer keeping safety systems (SIS/RCS/RHR/CS/ESW/AFW) co-located or in adjacent modules
Avoid mixing nuclear-grade and non-nuclear work packages in the same module when possible
Respect safety train A/B separation conceptually (not fully encoded without layout geometry)
min_size=2 systems per module; max_size = max(5, n//k + 3)

forbid_mixing_groups.name: nuclear_vs_secondary
forbid_mixing_groups.description: Soft penalty when a module mixes primary nuclear and secondary energy systems
